title: Inventory indigenous health data sources
outcome: A dated source inventory respecting CARE principles and documenting data-governance status.
validation_method: Reviewer checks each source for governance documentation, methodology, and limitations.
done_condition: Four sources classified with governance-status documentation.

title: Consult indigenous data governance for measurement framework
outcome: A measurement framework co-designed with indigenous data governance authorities.
validation_method: Independent indigenous governance review confirms framework compliance, and a second indigenous governance reviewer replicates the governance-constraint check before any measurement framework is accepted.
done_condition: Framework approved by indigenous data governance with documentation and replicated governance review.

title: Measure health access gaps with data sovereignty
outcome: An access-gap analysis governed by indigenous data sovereignty principles.
validation_method: Replicator confirms methodology and governance compliance.
done_condition: Gap analysis with governance compliance and replication.

title: Red-team colonial data extraction risks
outcome: Failure-mode review identifying data-extraction and stigmatization risks.
done_condition: Claims qualified or gated with sovereignty safeguards.

title: Check whether outputs match indigenous health planning needs
outcome: Field-facing review with indigenous health governance.
validation_method: Indigenous governance review identifies decision, user, misuse risk, replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, indigenous-governance sign-off.
